title: Kirby
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Youmay|the [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]]|[[Kirby (smuggler)|Kirby]] the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]]}} {{Character |type=Rebel |image=[[File:Kirby.png]] |name=Kirby |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' [[Dreighton Triangle]]''[[Star Wars: Rebel Assault II: The Hidden Empire]]'' |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]]{{Fact}} |pronouns=He/him{{Fact}} |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Maybe it's true what they say…''"
"''Now don't start telling me any phantom fighter tales. Geez, you farm boys'll believe anything you hear.|Rookie One and Kirby|audio=RookieOneKirby-RAII.flac|}} '''Kirby''' was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who held the [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] of [[Commander/Legends|commander]] in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Following the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], he led a [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing]] patrol to the [[Dreighton Triangle]], accompanied by his [[Wingmate/Legends|wingmate]], "[[Rookie One]]." During their patrol, the Rebels received a [[Distress signal/Legends|distress call]] from the [[Unidentified captain (Corellia Star)|captain]] of the [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]] ''[[Corellia Star]]'' who tried to warn the Alliance about the secret [[TIE/ph "Phantom" Multi-Role Stealth Starfighter/Legends|TIE Phantom]] project. As the pair attempted to reach the [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]], a TIE Phantom used its [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaking device]] to take them by surprise, destroying Kirby's B-wing and [[Death/Legends|killing]] the pilot. ==Biography== At some point during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] Kirby joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] as a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and, by [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]] held the [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] of [[Commander/Legends|commander]].{{LucasArts|url=products/rebel2/reb_stry.htm|text=''Rebel Assault II'' - Original Story}} Following the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]] in 3 ABY, Kirby was assigned to lead a [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] on a patrol close to the [[Dreighton Triangle]],{{InsiderCite|27|LucasArts Update|Excerpts from the Journal of a Rebel Pilot}} an area of [[Realspace/Legends|space]] known for reports of [[ghost ship]]s ever since the [[Battle of Dreighton]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Unbenkownst to the Rebels, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] was using the unexplained events in the area as a cover for tests of the [[TIE/ph "Phantom" Multi-Role Stealth Starfighter/Legends|TIE Phantom]], a new starfighter that was fitted with a [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaking device]] that rendered it invisible to other [[Starship/Legends|vessels]]. [[File:Kirby2.png|thumb|left|250px|A TIE Phantom pursues Kirby's B-wing starfighter.]] During their patrol, the Rebels received a [[Distress signal/Legends|distress signal]] coming from inside the [[Dreighton Nebula/Legends|Dreighton Nebula]]. Kirby instructed one of his [[Wingmate/Legends|wingmates]], a young [[Rebel pilot/Legends|Rebel pilot]] known as "[[Rookie One]]," to accompany him and the two broke away from their squadron and entered the [[Nebula/Legends|nebula]] to investigate. Once inside the nebula, the two Rebels made contact with the [[Unidentified captain (Corellia Star)|captain]] of the [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]] ''[[Corellia Star]]'', whose vessel was under attack from Imperial fighters. The [[Captain/Legends|captain]] claimed to be carrying information that was vital to the Alliance, though signal interference prevented the Rebels from hearing the whole message. As they moved to assist, they were quickly [[Battle in the Dreighton system|intercepted]] by a swarm of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]]. Though they were heavily outnumbered, Kirby and Rookie One were able to eliminate the enemy fighters, but not before the Imperials boarded and captured the ''Corellia Star''. Once the area was clear of threats, the Rebels continued toward the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dreighton]] in pursuit of the captured [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]]. Kirby was aware that a Rebel patrol had been lost in the area three days ago and was suspicious of how quickly the TIEs had reached them from the freighter. Suspecting that there may be more, he warned Rookie One to stay vigilant as they approached the planet. The younger pilot soon picked up the distress signal but, moments later, a TIE Phantom de-cloaked behind his B-wing and opened fire. Rookie One's fighter lost an [[S-foils/Legends|S-foil]] and careened toward the planet's surface, though the pilot was able to eject before impact. With one B-wing eliminated, the Imperial [[TIE pilot|pilot]] fired upon Kirby's B-wing. Unable to evade the enemy [[Laser/Legends|laser]] fire, Kirby was [[Death/Legends|killed]] when his starfighter exploded. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|I was scared, but I was with Commander Kirby, and he's one of the best.|Rookie One|}} Kirby was a veteran pilot with a no-nonsense attitude. The commander was personable and was both well liked and respected by those under his command. He had a tendency to be cynical and mocked Rookie One for apparently believing the tales of ghost ships in the Dreighton Triangle. ==Behind the scenes== {{Quote|Rebel control, this is patrol leader. We lost the Rookie. I'm continuing onward.|Kirby, from a game over cutscene|audio=Kirby-RAII.flac|}} Kirby was created for the [[1995]] [[LucasArts]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Rebel Assault II: The Hidden Empire]]'', in which he appears during the cutscenes for the first two levels. The character was portrayed in the game by actor [[Chopper Bernet]]. If Rookie One is killed during the level "The Dreighton Triangle," the game over cutscene shows Kirby reporting that Rookie One has been killed and that he is continuing to Dreighton alone. [[File:Wedge_helmet_SW_Costumes.jpg|thumb|right|210px|Wedge Antilles' flight helmet from ''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']] ''Rebel Assault II'' designer [[Vincent Lee]]'s storyboards and scripts document, dated [[November 16]], [[1994]], included a brief description of Kirby.''[[Rogue Leaders: The Story of LucasArts]]'' Though not included in the game or its manual, the biography was adapted for use on the LucasArts website and the document was later printed in [[Rob Smith]]'s ''[[Rogue Leaders: The Story of LucasArts]]''. Lee's notes place the character in his early forties but his age is not specified in either the game or his online biography. Lee also made notes on the people he thought symbolized each character in the game, choosing actor [[Wikipedia:Ed Harris|Ed Harris]] to represent Kirby. The [[Star Wars Insider 27|''Star Wars Insider'' 27]] article "[[LucasArts Update|''Excerpts from the Journal of a Rebel Pilot'']]" by [[Sue Seserman]] was presented as Rookie One's diary entries surrounding the mission to the Dreighton Nebula. The article erroneously describes the circumstances of Kirby's death, stating that his B-wing was destroyed before Rookie One's is hit, while ''Rebel Assault II'' shows Kirby's death taking place after Rookie One has already crashed on Dreighton. Props and costumes created for the [[original trilogy]] of ''[[Star Wars]]'' movies were used during the filming of ''Rebel Assault II''.{{LucasArts|url=products/rebel2/reb_vid.htm|text=''Rebel Assault II'' - Live Action Video}} The [[Flight helmet/Legends|flight helmet]] worn by Kirby is the same design as that worn by [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] in [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']].''[[Star Wars Costumes: The Original Trilogy]]'' ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Rebel Assault II: The Hidden Empire]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== {{Mediacat|soundcat=Audio files of Kirby}} *{{InsiderCite|27|LucasArts Update|Excerpts from the Journal of a Rebel Pilot}} *{{LucasArts|url=products/rebel2/reb_stry.htm|text=''Rebel Assault II'' - Original Story}} *''[[Rogue Leaders: The Story of LucasArts]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Alliance Starfighter Corps personnel]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]]
